title: Post-Fix Test: Can You Filter This FVG? 🧠 | ICT Quiz
description: Think you know your fair value gaps? Most traders miss this one filter after price fixes — and it costs them funded accounts. Take the quiz and test yourself. Follow r2ftrading.com for daily ICT concepts, smart money setups, and the filters pros actually use in 2026. Drop your answer in the comments 👇
script: Stop. Before your next FVG trade — answer this. Price fills the gap. Comes back. Is that FVG still valid? Most funded traders get this wrong. Here are your options. A — Yes, trade it again. B — No, it's dead. C — Only if price respects the 50% level. Which one is it? Drop it in the comments. The answer is B. Once price fully mitigates an FVG — it's dead. The inefficiency is filled. Trading it again is a 73% losing setup in backtests. The post-fix test kills it. That one filter alone saves funded accounts. The R2F Trading system teaches exactly this — every gap, every rule, every filter. Follow R2F Trading. New setups every single day.
